title: Tesla: request exception
description: An outbound HTTP request via Tesla exceptioned. By default only the hostname is captured; enable full_url in insights_config for the full path. Finch-backed Tesla clients are deduplicated — only the Finch event is emitted if both are instrumented.

url.description: Full request URL. Only present when full_url: true is configured.

request_id.description: Request ID from the current EventContext.
